content.full_text:
October 17, 2008

James C. Harrison
Remcho, Johansen & Purcell, LLP
201 Dolores Avenue
San Leandro, California 94577

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-08-123

Dear Mr. Harrison:

This letter confirms that you have withdrawn the request for advice on behalf of your client, Presima, Inc.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division
